title: Every customer you can’t enroll is a kilowatt you can’t dispatch
snippet: Flexibility's grid value is proven. The real constraint now is how many customers you can enroll.
ai_summary: Article discusses flexibility markets and customer enrollment challenges, which is relevant to tem's flex/trading business but lacks UK-specific context or actionable insights for tem's current operations.
ai_reasoning: Flexibility and demand-side response are part of tem's business model, but this is a US-focused piece on Utility Dive without direct relevance to UK market dynamics, competitors, or regulatory changes. Worth background reading on flex trends.
